title: odontites longiflorus subsp. lateritius
intro: Odontites longiflorus subsp. lateritius is a subspecies of the Odontites longiflorus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Odontites longiflorus subsp. lateritius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to promote wound healing and skin health.
